reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_5o-PFtAHwR_E90XSIEieY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2aTVuZ21nRRAB
reviews.text: Not as convenient as they advertise.   I must be in my state to even interview with an MD.  They don't consider home address or shipping address.  I work all over the world and this doesn't work for me.  I will return to my local functional medicine group.  I recommend finding a local group.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_5o-PFtAHwR_E90XSIEieY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaXV2Q3ZnRRAB
reviews.text: Went to my appointment and some random office dude gave me an iPad with a sales pitch video to watch in the waiting room. I left undecided and got a bill for over 200 bucks for absolutely no services offered. I refused to pay that and the lady that called me was inept and aggressive on the phone. I’ve never even seen the actual doctor.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_5o-PFtAHwR_E90XSIEieY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCN1llODRnRRAB
reviews.text:
Accessibility: Poor. Often absent at office visits. Refused to hear a problem or return my call.
Attention to Patient Needs: Poor. Does not review patient’s chart and reason for visit prior to seeing the patient. Does not listen to patients.
Bedside Manner: Poor. Arrogant, egotistical. Initially friendly, but quickly impatient. Interrupts, does not allow the patient to communicate. Assumes rather than inquires. Lectures rather than listens.
Knowledge Base: Questionable, remedial. Does not customize treatment plans.

My Experiences:
Dr. Behling was physically absent at 2 of 3 in-office appointments, unprepared at third visit. At my initial assessment, the MA took my vitals, led me to an exam room, and then after a long wait brought in an iPad with Dr. Behling on a video chat app. If you work in healthcare, you know all initial assessments are performed in-person. This also happened at my third visit. It’s frustrating to drive 35 minutes to an office, sit an hour only to discover the doctor is on a ship in the middle of the ocean, using satellite internet with unreliable service.

Dr. Behling’s impatience, assumptiveness, and proclivity to jump to incorrect conclusions impeded effective communication and appropriate delivery of care. A healthcare assessment starts with the physician asking questions and listening to the patient’s answers. Not only did Dr. Behling not ask the questions, but when given a small amount of information he immediately jumped to wrong conclusions and did not allow the opportunity to communicate further. When I called to report that a medication he ordered was not delivered and I was having problems due to not having that med, Dr. Behling refused to take or return my phone call and instead instructed his staff to set up a telephone visit a couple weeks later. This resulted in me seeking medical advice elsewhere; I was instructed to use a med by my previous doctor then notify Dr. Behling. However, when I attempted to communicate this to Dr. Behling, he immediately became angry and started yelling at me about self-medicating and double dosing. He did not allow me to explain that another doctor had recommended this because he failed to provide the meds or return my call and I was having problems because of this.

Testosterone Pellet Placement: Dr. Behling did not demonstrate expertise with this procedure and would benefit from further education. After fumbling around for quite a while, he placed the pellets in the middle of the gluteals instead of more towards the hip. Every time I sat down, such as to drive home, the pressure of sitting made it feel that the pellets would be pushed out. I was constantly checking for correct placement. This area was very sore for 2 weeks, likely due to his fumbling during this procedure, and I now have a noticeable scar in a once beautiful area.

Weight Loss Program: Of note, I was not there for weight loss, but rather for HRT. During my visits, I observed that Dr. Behler does not customize his weight loss program. At my third visit, Dr. Behling immediately started the visit by discussing I had lost 1.5 pounds and needed to exercise 5 hours/week. At a prior visit, he told me if I wanted to lose weight I needed to exercise 5 hours/week, eat breakfast, and take phentermine. This is not a customized plan. We’ve all heard we need to “exercise more” and “eat a healthy breakfast,” but for some people like me, this does not work and I said so. I exercise daily. I gain weight if I eat in the morning. He disagreed, said I apparently wasn’t exercising enough. These interactions demonstrated his unpreparedness for visits, arrogance that he knows better than the patients, and that he does not customize his treatment plans.

I’m sad to say I experienced very poor delivery of care. Before writing this review, I attempted to communicate these issues to both Dr. Behling and his office staff; however, his office manager/wife was more interested in defending him than listening, resulting in her outright contradicting her own husband’s medical instructions.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_5o-PFtAHwR_E90XSIEieY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2cFpmeTdnRRAB
reviews.text:
OMGEEEEE!! And Alexandra is the Office Manager she knows nothing about Medical Records Request that is authorized by the patient. 9/22 I faxed over the request allowing them a few days to process. Nothing. 9/30 I called and spoke with Alexandra she was going to fax request. Nothing. 10/4 I spoke with Chantelle (who does Admin work) Alexandra was not in so I left a message.  Nothing. 10/5 I called {note that I am always the one following up) spoke with Alexandra she says we are NOT the PCP and we are just trying to benefit from their records.
Excuse me!! Last I checked the patient has the right to authorize/request their own record.   Life Restore has NO say to deny request.  I had to get one of my Doctor's to speak with her as she is so not compliant. He explained to her on patient's right even if we are NOT the PCP and neither is Life Restore.  Are they hiding something??? Why such a "roadblock"?
On standby for the records. Will see!  Alexandra advice to you
: you are wearing your Office manager title lil to hard.  Please provide better customer service as this is a mutual patient that we are helping as well!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_5o-PFtAHwR_E90XSIEieY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLbHEyRDFRRRAB
reviews.text: Called in to ask about specific Therapy. Staff could not answer questions.   Instead they just want to force you into an Appointment.  Their web site states one thing and they offer something different.  Very disappointed.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUflJJvBtAHwRWb_aMEt7DWU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GNGEwUTBOVE5yU2pSNVpHbHJiMlpuTTE4MGFrRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say ENOUGH GREAT THINGS ABOUT REVIBE! Where to start! From our first consult we were in a serious health concern and REVIBE gave us relief and hope. They extended  courtesy that we will always be grateful for. Natasha is so on point admin and goes beyond that. She listened to our struggle. Amazing person. Greg is packed full
of information and answers all your questions and is sympathetic to your concerns. We felt Greg was transparent and honest. Friendly and didn’t rush us thru just sign here and pay. If I could give REVIBE 100 star I would. Then there is Kailee. She was jumping into a high stressed situation and diffused our health concern just by knowing how we were so worried and knowing the situation she helped us. Then there was Jo! She is the only nurse who was able to help our situation with skill and compassion she put us at ease and the only one to get a blood draw on the first try!! That never happens!! There aren’t words to convey our appreciation , respect and gratitude to explain our FIRST VISIT! We again and always will hold REVIBE as our prayers answered and are filled with hope for the future with them as we make our journey with TRT. Thank you to the team at REVIBE!! All of you together are making this company what it is and it shows!! We can’t wait to see how our lives will improve thanks to REVIBE!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUflJJvBtAHwRWb_aMEt7DWU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Od1l5MW1UM2xMTlVOTllpMXZkSGRWVkZVd05GRRAB
reviews.text: So far so good with Revibe. They made it easy to schedule an appointment, (I went with video, but you can go in person) and just met them for a quick physical and I’m starting a program. Seems affordable for services they offer, so I’m looking forward to hopefully good results!

reviews.name: places/ChIJUflJJvBtAHwRWb_aMEt7DWU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGUVZETTJTbnB0UWxaQ1pHaFlZeTAwWTFrMFJsRRAB
reviews.text: Always a wonderful experience at revive men’s health Center in Honolulu. The expert staff is extremely knowledgeable, friendly and professional in all they do! I truly appreciate what they have done for me . I Highly recommend their services. Wish I would’ve started sooner. Mahalo

reviews.name: places/ChIJUflJJvBtAHwRWb_aMEt7DWU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205S1NtWm5WbFZZU21jeVVGOW1NVWh3YTFSUWJIYxAB
reviews.text:
5/5 Experience
I had the pleasure of meeting John during my onboarding, and he’s a solid professional who truly takes care of people. The entire team here is friendly, transparent, and kind, you can expect every interaction to be genuine and high-quality.

What stood out to me most was how well they explain everything. They’ll walk you through why you’re doing something, how to do it, what the expected outcome is, and how to adjust if anything changes. That level of communication makes the whole process smooth and stress-free.

I highly recommend this location. From my research, many other places felt strictly like businesses. This one, however, feels community-oriented. You’re not just another customer, you’re part of something where people care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUflJJvBtAHwRWb_aMEt7DWU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKTVUwMUtPRU5OYVZOVFNrcFFTMHhPUzNsS01YYxAB
reviews.text: Revibe Men’s Health is outstanding! The staff is professional, friendly, and makes the whole process easy and comfortable. My treatment has delivered real results and boosted my energy and confidence. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJb6AQceNtAHwR_kMtPAPZysM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3dVA3TFFREAE
reviews.text:
Victor is a super chill guy and accomodating.

We had a good quick chat about many things.

I wanted to try the Sauna Space sauna even though it wasn’t on the booking system he helped me book it in.

He has a great HBOT chamber, probably the best on the island, and many other great things like Cryotherapy.

Will definitely be back when I visit next 🤙🏼

reviews.name: places/ChIJb6AQceNtAHwR_kMtPAPZysM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobC1maTBRRRAB
reviews.text:
Misleading.  On the sauna booking site it states.

It's a 2 person sauna, so bring a friend.
Base Price: $30
Tax: $1.41 (4.712%)
Total Price: $31.41

I guess base price is the caught because when I and my wife finished they charged $30 each.  So $60 for 30 minutes if you bring a friend.  Maybe I misunderstood and I did point out that the booking site was misleading.

I have used several IR saunas and this one was okay but not worth $60 for 30mins.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb6AQceNtAHwR_kMtPAPZysM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlb29MTWx3RRAB
reviews.text:
DO NOT do business here. The owner is unprofessional and rude. I booked an appointment online this morning for a service that wasn't even available! I get a text half hour before my appointment that they are still waiting for the delivery of liquid nitrogen to arrive. I live in Kapolei,  I'm leaving more than a half hour before my appointment to get there on time!

Who I presumed to be the owner told me that he sent me a text ahead of time...A HALF HOUR ONLY while I was already on my way. I asked him why make the service available to book online if the service isn't available?? He could've easily blocked it out or not taken appointments for that service until it was available. He said there was no appointments made before he went to bed so be still made it available to book even though the service itself was not. He basically blamed everyone else instead of taking responsibility for making a service available that wasn't. It would have been nice to have been offered some type of compensation fr this inconvenience bit of course none was offered.

It's not often I have a terrible experience for a service that I wasn't even serviced for.

UPDATE TO THE OWNERS RESPONSE: he still thinks that a 30 minute notice is adequate time to notify someone of a service not being available and takes no responsibility whatsoever. The owner should be more on top of things and take responsibility when they messed up. Yes, the owner did offer me something complimentary that I did not go there for and a SPECIFIED  cryo treatment also which I did not go there for. Not an actual complimentary full treatment for messing up. This is like making a hair appointment but when you get there they have no babrers but want to offer you some other complimentary treatment that is irrelevant to what you went there for.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb6AQceNtAHwR_kMtPAPZysM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2a3BXdWlBRRAB
reviews.text: Super Human Health is a rare find in Hawaii! Victor was very knowledgeable, professional, and friendly. He helped me understand which services would be most beneficial for me. I had a wonderful experience and will be back again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb6AQceNtAHwR_kMtPAPZysM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpM0tuY1FREAE
reviews.text: Wow! I went on a whim attempting to relieve some back pain. 1 Star for great service, 1 star for friendly staff, 1 star for the awesome massage by Guiliani, 1 star for the sauna, 1 star for the compression therapy, 1 star for the cryotherapy...shoot i ran out of stars. I'd give more if I could! Viktor is the sweetest and is full of knowledge! Tap into his healthy eating tips! I cannot wait to go back! I tried everything and will book another full day! Took about 3 hours for all sessions. Mahalo! Leslie :-)

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7wyRSHNuAHwRgMpj-cK-Nus/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURndjZYcUdnEAE
reviews.text: Had a fantastic first experience at Thrive Medspa with Fay! She made me feel comfortable and made sure I understood my options / the process with injections. I will absolutely be returning. Highly recommended 12/10!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7wyRSHNuAHwRgMpj-cK-Nus/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEOVp5WTRnRRAB
reviews.text: Had my first appointment with Thrive Med Spa & Wellness today and I have nothing but positive wonderful thing's to say about my visit for lip fillers, which I've never had done before. Angelica whom did my lip fillers was sweet, calming, informative & made me feel completely at ease when I had arrived a little nervous. If your thinking of getting any procedure, especially fillers done I'd highly recommend this business & their staff. Great experience! 👍🏻

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7wyRSHNuAHwRgMpj-cK-Nus/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzOW9YZzlBRRAB
reviews.text: What a professional, tight ship you operate! I have moved a lot and have been getting Dysport or Botox for a number of years and have had a number of providers in several countries, which I have always researched and chosen carefully (medical backgrounds/reviews).  I was highly impressed with how helpful and competent the front desk staff was and that gave me great confidence in your clinic as a service provider.  I was scheduled for Dysport with Fay and she was fantastic! Highly knowledgeable, friendly, and I’m sure the results will speak for themselves.  I will be back.  10/10.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7wyRSHNuAHwRgMpj-cK-Nus/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkeDhYbDJBRRAB
reviews.text: I was nervous about getting lip injections for the first time but Angelica did a wonderful job of explaining everything and giving me options. She was able to tell me the pros and cons of each type of filler and helped me make the best decision for what I wanted. Angelica is very sweet and thorough and I think she truly cares about her patients and her work. I will definitely be going back!

reviews.name: places/ChIJk40qUS4VAHwRzLejbef410A/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOTlpWQXlNbUpmV0VweFVsb3hZbVZtUVdSMFYwRRAB
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at GameDay Men’s Health! The weight loss shots truly changed my life  I’m down 50 pounds and feel better than ever. The staff is supportive, knowledgeable, and made the whole process easy and comfortable. I’m so grateful for the confidence and energy I’ve gained. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJk40qUS4VAHwRzLejbef410A/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paRlZuTldUR2x0VDNOQlRGVTJWR2xGYURrMFptYxAB
reviews.text:
I had a really good experience at Gameday Men’s Health. This was my first time ever going to a men’s health clinic, so I didn’t really know what to expect, but the whole team made it super comfortable from the start.

I went in for peptide therapy and labs to check my testosterone for possible TRT. The blood draw was quick and easy, and they explained everything in a way that actually made sense. No pressure, no weird sales vibes — just helpful, professional people who genuinely care.

It’s only been 5 days and I’m already down 8 pounds, which is honestly wild. I’ve been trying to lose that last bit of stubborn fat for a while, so finally seeing movement feels good.

If you’re on Oʻahu and have been thinking about getting your levels checked or dialing in your health, I’d definitely recommend stopping by. Solid experience all around and stoked we have this option

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at Gamedays Men’s Health. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable, respected, and genuinely cared for. They take the time to actually listen to your concerns instead of rushing you in and out like most places.

reviews.name: places/ChIJvQtWc9wUAHwRLI7JHWkhfI4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJaXJtWmNBEAE
reviews.text: FINALLY I have found help for my chronic pain (now only sporadic) and long-lasting health concerns (dissipating)!! I first went to see Dr. Gloria after trying several types of western medical approaches that did not work. Although the functional medicine treatment process is involved and takes time, I have experienced distinct improvements in less than 6 months thus far. Dr. Gloria is a true gem, very patient and an excellent listener with an incredible heart. And brilliant!!!! I'm learning so much about how to take care of myself by making wise/informed food choices, and it's definitely paying off. I finally have hope now that I can really get better, with Dr. Gloria to guide me through.  If you have serious health concerns and need a new approach, I cannot recommend her more highly.

reviews.name: places/ChIJvQtWc9wUAHwRLI7JHWkhfI4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDOGY2a2FREAE
reviews.text: I initially went to see Dr. Gloria for chronic nausea, digestive issues, mood issues like anxiety and hormonal imbalances, and to generally optimize my health for the future (being in my late 20's), and I came away learning that all of my symptoms were the result of leaky gut. Instead of treating my symptoms, Dr. Gloria really got to the root of my problems and through testing, we found I had nutrient deficiencies and multiple food sensitivities. Dr. Gloria put together a personalized diet and supplement plan to heal my gut and get my nutrient levels back up. I can honestly I have never felt better and healthier in my life. All of my symptoms are gone, my mood and hormonal imbalances are fixed and I know the personalized tools I need to take care of my health moving forward for many years to come. Dr. Gloria is so amazing at looking at the individual, really listening to me and taking the time to hear me out, and guiding me along every step of the way so I felt empowered to get my health back. This journey completely changed my life and I'm so happy to have worked with her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJvQtWc9wUAHwRLI7JHWkhfI4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJa01YVEhnEAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Gloria has completely changed my life and my perspective on nutrition. After visiting a number of specialists about my chronic joint pain, I was basically told they couldn’t help and to come back when my symptoms got worse. Since I was having issues getting through the work day and only in my late twenties, I felt frustrated and defeated.

Luckily, Dr. Gloria took a completely different approach. She ran a number of comprehensive tests and came up with a personalized nutritional plan. It was a lot of hard work but after a few months, my symptoms were completely gone! I was able to heal my body through my diet and I’m now a huge advocate of functional medicine. If you are looking for a doctor who will actually listen and get to the root of your issues, I would definitely recommend Dr. Gloria.

reviews.name: places/ChIJvQtWc9wUAHwRLI7JHWkhfI4/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqb05US3VnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Gloria is incredible! She saved my life. I was having severe dementia symptoms (in my early 30's) and was too tired to function. No other doctor was able to help me. I spoke to her on the phone for 10 minutes and she knew where the problem was stemming from and what tests needed to be done to pin point the problem. After figuring out the problem, she walked me through exactly what needed to be done. I could not recommend her more and I am forever grateful for her service.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKx-4NacVAHwR3ZSMxMggysU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpMkp1VFRBEAE
reviews.text: I have been a patient of Dr. Sharma for almost 2 years and I've found him to be compassionate and knowledgeable in the field of alternative medicine. I've always felt welcomed arriving at his office. Dr. Sharma makes it a point to fully understand the purpose of  your visit and explains his reasons for the procedures offered. Dr. Sharma is always accommodating. I plan to continue my treatments and highly recommend him.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKx-4NacVAHwR3ZSMxMggysU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4NDk3WmJREAE
reviews.text: It’s difficult to put into words how thankful I am to have found Dr Sharma. As someone who has suffered with gut issues for 10 years and has seen every kind of medical professional, I was so relieved to finally meet a physician that wanted to get to the root of the problem versus being put on heavy medication or told there’s nothing I could do about it. I used to avoid several different food groups & exercises to avoid discomfort and inflammation but after seeing Dr Sharma for about six months, I’m now able to eat freely and without restrictions. As of today I’m in maintenance-mode, which is the best feeling in the world! We’re now discussing ways to best optimize my health, with the assistance of high-quality supplements, which I love. Thank you so much, Dr Sharma!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJKx-4NacVAHwR3ZSMxMggysU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1ZzlDUE13EAE
reviews.text: I felt an amazing vibe and engery coming into Dr. Sharma office. He was so welcoming and professional. I loved how educated and full of knowledge he has and truly listened to my concerns and problems. I would totally recommend this clinic to all my friends and family. I love how he focuses on a more natural approach to heal and get better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKx-4NacVAHwR3ZSMxMggysU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDOTVEZGNBEAE
reviews.text: I started to meet Dr. Sharma about 2 years ago and I am very glad I did. I had been to various other doctors who were analyzing my symptoms but no one was able to understand the root cause of my problem. Until I visited Hawaii Integrative and Dr. Sharma asked more questions about my living conditions. Only then were we able to uncover the source of my health complications: mold. After he figured out what was causing my health to be affected he immediately had me on a regiment to fix the problem entirely. Dr. Sharma’s attention to detail and persistence when solving a problem is unparalleled. I highly recommend him as a Doctor.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKx-4NacVAHwR3ZSMxMggysU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtXzdieTNRRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Sharma is knowledgeable in certain areas. He tried to help me as much as he could with his protocols and I’m thankful for that, however, after finding a holistic practitioner, I’ve learned that the body needs to heal as a whole and not just one area. Dr. Sharma only focused on one area, which is the gut. Yes, I was having gut issues, but the body is like a puzzle; pieces needs to be looked at before making it a whole again.

I highly suggest reading Heal Yourself by Sandie Gascon.

reviews.text: Went in for a ganglion block treatment, amazingly friendly staff , beautiful place , easy parking , I feel like a new person relaxed and more capable of taking my time to create expressions with intention instead of raw emotion 😹 , highly recommended , amazing vibes, friendly genuinely helpful humans doing good all the time for as many people as they can! On top of that, my favorite restaurant is next door! ZEN, BEAUTIFUL, and caring! What more could you ask for?

reviews.name: places/ChIJS4ovWEcPVHkR78QCScxggKM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdm9DbXV3RRAB
reviews.text: There are so many wonderful things I want to say about Dr. Price and her staff. Never have I had a doctor like her. Professionally, she goes beyond any expectations of a doctor. She takes the time to seriously listen to concerns and will do the research to obtain the best results. She doesn’t follow the “one size fits all “ idea and will incorporate other methods of treatment. And it doesn’t stop with her. Her staff are professional as well as kind and caring. Nurses Jenn and Shannon are beyond kind and compassionate as well as technically skilled. You know you’re in the best hands with Dr. Price.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS4ovWEcPVHkR78QCScxggKM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdnZ2dmN3EAE
reviews.text: I have been with Dr. Price-Schwartz for quite some time now. She is very personable, intelligent, funny, and has genuine concern. A very relatable physician and comfortable to with.  I might be too comfortable with her as I tell her everything, and she is very patient with me (no pun intended).  I receive great, quality care with Dr. Price-Schwartz.  She will go above and beyond to get the care you need.  She makes me feel as if I'm her only patient.  Office is very clean and inviting.  Staff is very friendly and capable and make you feel at home as well.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS4ovWEcPVHkR78QCScxggKM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdm9Yd1pnEAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Shannon Price Swartz is honestly the best Dr. I've had. I have been seeing her for years and I feel like I'm going to a see a friend who really cares about me and my well-being.
She goes way beyond what Doctors do for their patients and spends time with you. Her clinic is beautiful and she offers whole wellness therapies and treatments and normal medical care. I highly recommend Evolve Medical Center for all your Health Care.
The staff is the best also they treat you like family. I am so fortunate to have them taking care of me. I give them 💯💫💖🧑‍🎨stars!! 🙏💖🧘‍♀️🕊️🌎🌺

reviews.name: places/ChIJS4ovWEcPVHkR78QCScxggKM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtb2RhMDh3RRAB
reviews.text:
My experiences with Dr Price-schwartz and her staff are exceptional. They treat me as a loved member of their family yet always profesional, assuring I'm in a safe atmosphere.  They take the extra steps needed to provide expedient results needed for their patients care. My overall health has remarkably improved with the help of this medical office.
Thank you, Dr Price- Schwartz and staff for your continued care and concern.
Joni Hall

I highly recommend her and have brought in my daughter to see her too.  My daughter said she enjoys her visits with Dr. Suzuki.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8QtDnMrRVHkRMatf9izOyo4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1NFUwMVViVk0zVW5aS1FuQnhjRlY2VUZSd1lYYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr.Okwuje, Liane, Malachi and Sandra made visiting Revitalize Maui a great pleasure! Dr.Okwuje's expertise in this field is second to none leaving the patient feeling totally confident in his ability. His easy going manner and friendly nature puts one at ease immediately and this is greatly appreciated. Nurse Liane was wonderful in every way, continually keeping a person content and offering total support to ensure a positive experience! Sandra and Malachi were very friendly, obliging and efficient in their duties!
Mahalo Team Revitalize Maui for all of the professionalism along with being true to your website's statements as the renewed natural glow and effect on my face is transformational! I cannot say enough! Mahalo once again.🌺

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8QtDnMrRVHkRMatf9izOyo4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwck9FZG5jakoxWVhOV2JUTnVSa3BMV0d4ZlNuYxAB
reviews.text:
I am so grateful for Dr. O and his entire team. From the moment I started working with him for HRT, I felt supported, understood, and truly cared for. His knowledge and expertise are like no other , and today he and his staff went above and beyond to make sure all my questions were answered and that I felt comfortable every step of the way.

What I appreciate most is that even as a male doctor, he genuinely cares about women’s health and takes the time to understand what we’re going through. His injections are incredibly smooth, and he always keeps my face looking on point—natural, refreshed, and exactly how I like it.

I’m incredibly thankful to have found someone who is helping me feel like myself again—bringing me back to life, and more. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8QtDnMrRVHkRMatf9izOyo4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25NeFVVSklaMVI2U2s5WFVIRjZUVlZuWTIweGNYYxAB
reviews.text:
I am beyond thrilled that I chose RevitalizeMaui; truly one of the best decisions I’ve ever made for myself. From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed, cared for, and completely at ease. The entire staff is so warm, professional, and attentive, they treated me like family and made the whole experience feel luxurious and personal. They listened so carefully to what I was hoping to achieve, and then made it happen better than I even imagined.

I had a BioLift treatment, and I can honestly say the results are nothing short of life-changing. I look YEARS younger, my skin is glowing, lifted, and so refreshed. I finally feel like I recognize myself again when I look in the mirror. It’s not just about the physical results (which are incredible) it’s how I feel walking out of there: confident, radiant, and completely renewed.

I’ve gotten nonstop compliments since my treatment. But even more than that, the hospitality and comfort provided at Maui Rejuvenation Center are on another level. They create such a peaceful and nurturing environment that you feel like you’re not just getting a service, but an experience. They genuinely care about your well-being and it shows in every detail.

If you’re on the fence about where to go on Maui, take this as your sign. I can’t recommend Maui Rejuvenation Center enough. They’ve absolutely changed my life and I will never go anywhere else!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ8QtDnMrRVHkRMatf9izOyo4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvMkt1Wkt3EAE
reviews.text: I’ve been a patient of Dr. O at Revitalize Maui for several years. His exceptional injection technique truly sets him apart from any other doctor on Maui. The consistent, high-quality results I’ve experienced year after year are a testament to his expertise and dedication. His professionalism and warm, friendly demeanor always make each visit a positive experience. I highly recommend Dr. O to anyone looking for expert care and reliable, lasting results.

reviews.text: Amazing start to our trip. Staff was extremely knowledgeable and was able to steer us in the right direction. Wife always gets sick as soon as our vacation starts. Stopped in for an immune push. She never got sick and felt like a superhero the whole trip. DO NOT MISS THIS SPOT!!!!  Trust us!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2xWRyonbVHkR-IXJJkTpleY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2dnAzZ2xBRRAB
reviews.text:
Just had IV Nutrient Therapy at the The Biostation at Grand Wailea. The facility is located near the gym and spa and it’s so easy to pop in and get an IV.  My bImmune IV featured Vitamin C, Zinc, Lysine, and B Vitamins. The final touch was a vitamin D shot. It takes about 45-60 minutes. Dany and her staff were lovely. They made sure I was comfortable and gave me snacks while I waited.

This is such a fabulous option for solo trips and for a wedding party to enjoy!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2xWRyonbVHkR-IXJJkTpleY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCaGFFTm9SV3BJWmtSUWRURjVjemRXY1dkSk5sRRAB
reviews.text: 20/10 would recommend Biostation!! The experience was amazing, they made great recommendations for which IV we needed, and we left feeling great. They were also so kind and personable. If you’re looking for services at the Grand Wailea, this is definitely the spot!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2xWRyonbVHkR-IXJJkTpleY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toTFJucEtaVkE0YlZkWVlXOVpjRjl3UzNOWWJrRRAB
reviews.text: This was the perfect way to start our vacation! My fiance and I booked a two hour NAD IV therapy. Dany was so professional and even found a vein in my arm which has not happened in over 20 years. We felt relaxed and ready to enjoy our week on this gorgeous island.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2xWRyonbVHkR-IXJJkTpleY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWYU9XOHlkbW8xU0hwRVZ6RktUVlZXVjBSSlNVRRAB
reviews.text: I routinely go in for a glutathione IV push. The office is beautiful and sparkling clean, the staff is exceptionally warm, friendly and informative, and i truly feel fabulous from the treatment.
